title: helichrysum maestum
intro: Helichrysum maestum, also known as the Yellow Everlasting, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, native to South Africa. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum maestum include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are often utilized in herbal remedies. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and even alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum maestum can be made into teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
